infoBanner: Services are the types of classes or sessions you offer. Here you define the name (e.g., Private English Lesson), the default duration, and the price. By creating your services, you streamline your scheduling to make your daily routine easier.
title: Services & Pricing
subtitle: Manage your different class types and their prices
noActiveServices: No active services found. Activate an existing service or create a new one.
noServicesDescription: Create your first service to define prices for your classes

fields.name: Service Name
fields.groupPricingNote: For group classes, this price will be charged individually to each participant, not split among students.

validation.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to create a service.
validation.validPrice: Price must be a valid value.
validation.validDuration: Duration must be greater than zero.
